message:
feat(Lib): Implement plistlib, modulefinder modules in Zig

annotationlib.zig:
- Format enum (VALUE, STRING, FORWARDREF, SOURCE)
- ForwardRef struct for forward reference annotations
- get_annotations, annotations_to_string, get_type_hints
- PEP 649 support with EvalMode (eager, deferred, stringified)

compression.zig:
- Format enum for compression types (gzip, bz2, lzma, xz, lz4, zstd)
- Level enum (none, fast, default, best)
- Compressor and Decompressor structs using std.compress.zlib
- detectFormat from data headers and filenames
- One-shot compress/decompress functions

concurrent.zig:
- Future(T) generic with state, result, callbacks
- FutureState enum (pending, running, finished, cancelled)
- ThreadPoolExecutor with work queue and condition variable
- ProcessPoolExecutor stub
- wait() function with return_when options

cProfile.zig:
- ProfileEntry with ncalls, tottime, cumtime tracking
- Profile struct with call stack tracking
- Stats for viewing/sorting profile results
- SortKey enum for 10 different sort orders
- Timer integration with std.time.nanoTimestamp
